completed_steps.summary: Classified as monorepo with 7 parts (types, cli, mcp, server, frontend, sudocode, plugins/5)
Found 25+ existing docs across packages + review/ directory with BMAD review findings
Tech stack: TypeScript 5.3+, Node.js 18+, React 18, Express 4.18, SQLite, Vitest 3.2, Vite 6.4

Exhaustive scan of all 350+ source files across 7 packages via 6 parallel agents. Types (9 files, 11 tables, 5 migrations), CLI (50+ files, 27 commands, CRUD+sync+merge), MCP (12 files, 32 tools, 11 scopes), Server (70+ files, 80+ endpoints, execution engine, workflows), Frontend (140+ files, 100+ components, 37+ hooks, 14 pages), Plugins (55+ files, 5 integrations, 9 BMAD personas)
Source tree documented with 350+ files annotated across all packages
Dev guide written with build, test, CI/CD, SEA packaging, code style details
Integration architecture documented: 5 integration points, 5 plugins, BMAD 4-layer integration, known issues
Architecture doc written with system design, storage, execution engine, workflows, BMAD, known issues (722 lines)
9 documentation files generated: index, overview, architecture, source-tree, data-models, api-contracts, component-inventory, integration, dev-guide
Master index generated with links to all 9 generated + 9 existing docs + review findings + external docs reference
Validation complete: all 9 files verified (3,674 total lines), no incomplete markers found

findings.technology_stack: TypeScript 5.3+ on Node.js 18+, React 18 frontend, Express 4.18 backend, SQLite storage, Vitest 3.2 testing
findings.architecture: Layered monorepo with shared types, CLI operations, MCP server (32 tools), Express REST API (80+ endpoints), React SPA (100+ components), 5 integration plugins, BMAD methodology support
